defs: Subduplicate of the triplicate; -- a term applied to ratios; thus, a and a are in the sesquiplicate ratio of b and b, when a is to a as the square root of the cube of b is to the square root of the cube of b, or a:a::√b3:√b3.
quotes: The periodic times of the planets are in the sesquiplicate ratio of their mean distances.
